data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft employs a microservices architecture which allows services to be independently deployable and scalable.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Built on top of Azure's scalable cloud services, enabling dynamic resource allocation.
data.technical_spec: Azure App Services, Azure Functions, Kubernetes.

data.title: CDN Implementation
data.description: Content Delivery Network (CDN) used for fast and reliable content delivery globally.
data.technical_spec: Azure CDN, distributed PoPs for content caching.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry point for APIs, providing route management and security.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Technique to split databases into smaller, faster, more manageable parts called shards.
data.technical_spec: Azure SQL Database, SQL Server Stretch Database.
